message:
feat: Add styled box rendering module with borders, padding, and margins

- Create ui/styled.rs with BoxStyle builder pattern for configuring boxes
- Implement BorderStyle enum: Normal, Rounded, Double, Thick, Hidden
- Add ASCII fallback for non-Unicode terminals
- Support Padding/Margin spacing, text alignment (Left, Center, Right)
- Add layout utilities: join_horizontal, join_vertical, place
- Create preset styles: info_box, warning_box, error_box, success_box,
  title_box, dialog_box, status_box
- Add unicode-width dependency for proper text width calculation
- All 22 styled module tests pass

Closes bead: remote_compilation_helper-bqd

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -33,6 +33,9 @@ tracing-subscriber = { version = "0.3", features = ["env-filter"] }
 # String search (SIMD-accelerated)
 memchr = "2.7"
 
+# Unicode text handling
+unicode-width = "0.2"
+
 # Regex for pattern matching
 regex = "1.11"

@@ -28,6 +28,7 @@ shellexpand = "3.1"
 dirs = "5"
 urlencoding = "2"
 colored = "2"
+unicode-width = { workspace = true }
 is-terminal = "0.4"
 terminal_size = "0.3"
 regex = "1"
